series_metadata.series_description: Card file summarizing 119 Hearings include case name, court, docket number, case synopsis; and list of filed pleadings, judgments used to compile annual reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned into electronic format ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed, and then destroy. If case is dismissed without prejudice, retain one year after statute of limitations runs, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
